creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 177226
boost 1.62 + misc fixes + commit message (rebased against ports r426695)

(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #132)
> New failures on 11.0 i386:
>
> + dns/powerdns-recursor

Fixed by ports r426688. Attachment 177223 helps fix runtime on amd64 but not i386. I can't debug as the stacktrace is unreadable for some reason (/head + drm-next-4.7 @ amd64 host here).

> + games/plee-the-bear

Unblocked by maintainer per bug 214516 comment 1.

> + graphics/appleseed

Fixed by ports r426695.

> + sysutils/facter

Fixed by ports r426627.

> + sysutils/freefilesync

Fixed by ports r426687.
